purpose: Validate that QSE Layer 1 (QSE-Rank: M, A, S, C) responds to genuine architecture improvement
refactoring_steps: Package restructuring: ltd.newbee.mall.* -> mall.* (6 second-level packages)
DAO CQRS split: 8 large Mappers -> ReadMapper + WriteMapper pairs
Service CQRS split: 3 large Services -> QueryService + CommandService pairs
Abstraction layer: ApiResponse, Pageable, DomainEntity, DataAccessObject interfaces
VO/Entity cohesion: equals/hashCode/toString added to 23 classes
key_findings: S responded strongly (+0.38) to package restructuring that created real layer differentiation
C responded moderately (+0.07) to VO/Entity cohesion methods and interface splitting
M showed small improvement (+0.02) from better package separation
QSE-Rank doubled (0.88 -> 1.77) moving repo from NEG to POS territory
AGQ_v2 moved from 0.49 (NEG) to 0.64 (solid POS range)
LCOM4 limitation: Java interfaces inherently have LCOM4=n_methods (no shared fields)
